title: tockPatron
description: tockPatron schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to the patron. Used internally by Tock.

email.description: The email address of the patron. No two patrons can have the same email address, but an email address is not required of all patrons.

firstName.description: If known, the first name of the patron.

lastName.description: If known, the last name of the patron.

phone.description: If known, the phone number of the patron without the country code.

phoneCountryCode.description: If known, the country code for the patron using the prefix code and the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. "+1 US").

zipCode.description: If known, the zip code given by the patron in their Tock profile.

imageUrl.description: If known, a URL to a public image of the patron.

isoCountryCode.description: If known, the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the patron lives.

loyaltyProgramCardNumber.description: If known and if the business participates in an integrated loyalty program, this field contains the card number given to the patron by the business.

loyaltyProgramAccountId.description: If known and if the business participates in an integrated loyalty program, this field contains the account identifier given to the patron by the business.
